---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
---

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt
from vega_datasets import data
```

```{python}
movies_extended = data.movies()
movies_extended.info()
```

# Visualizar valores faltantes

```{python}
nan_percent = movies_extended.isna().mean()*100
nan_percent_sorted = nan_percent.sort_values(ascending=False).round(2)
nan_percent_sorted
```

```{python}
movies_nans = movies_extended.isna().reset_index().melt(id_vars='index',var_name='column',value_name='NaN')
movies_nans
```

```{python}
alt.data_transformers.disable_max_rows()
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_nans).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('index:O'),
    alt.Y('column'),
    alt.Color('NaN')
).properties(
    width=1000
)
```

```{python}
threshold_nan = 70

cols_to_drop = nan_percent[nan_percent>threshold_nan].index

movies_cleaned = movies_extended.drop(columns=cols_to_drop)
movies_cleaned.info()

```

```{python}
movies_cleaned.describe()
```

## Distribución de todas las columnas númericas

```{python}
numerical_columns = movies_cleaned.select_dtypes('number').columns.tolist()
#[ 'US_Gross', 'Worldwide_Gross', 'Production_Budget', 'Running_Time_min','Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating','IMDB_Rating','IMDB_Votes']

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat(),type='quantitative',bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y('count()')
).properties(
    width=150,
    height=150
).repeat(
    numerical_columns,
    columns=4
)
```

```{python}

numerical_filtered = ['IMDB_Rating', 'Rotten_Tomatoes_Rating', 'US_Gross', 'Production_Budget']

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_point().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered
)

```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='quantitative', bin=alt.Bin(maxbins=30)),
    alt.Color('count()')
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).repeat(
    column=numerical_filtered,
    row=numerical_filtered
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent'
)
```

## Correlación de Pearson

```{python}
corr_matrix = movies_cleaned[numerical_columns].corr(method='pearson')
corr_matrix

```

```{python}
corr_df = corr_matrix.reset_index().melt(id_vars='index')
corr_df.columns = ['Variable1', 'Variable2', 'Correlacion']
corr_df
```

```{python}

corr_df = corr_df[corr_df['Variable1'] <= corr_df['Variable2']]

heatmap_corr = alt.Chart(corr_df).mark_rect().encode(
    alt.X('Variable1'),
    alt.Y('Variable2'),
    alt.Color('Correlacion', scale=alt.Scale(domain=[-1,1],scheme='redblue'))
).properties(
    width=300,
    height=300
)

text_corr = heatmap_corr.mark_text().encode(
    alt.Text('Correlacion', format='.2f'),
    color=alt.condition(
        'abs(datum.Correlacion) > 0.5',
        alt.value('white'),
        alt.value('black')
    )
)

(heatmap_corr + text_corr).configure_view(
    strokeWidth=0
)

```

## Variables categóricas

```{python}
movies_cleaned.describe(exclude='number')
```

```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_bar().encode(
    alt.X('count()'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat(), type='nominal',sort='-x')
).properties(
    width=150,
    height=150
).repeat(
    ['MPAA_Rating', 'Major_Genre', 'Creative_Type']
)
```


```{python}
categorical_filtered = ['MPAA_Rating', 'Major_Genre', 'Creative_Type']

alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_circle().encode(
    alt.X(alt.repeat('column'),type='nominal',sort='-size'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'),type='nominal',sort='size'),
    alt.Color('count()'),
    alt.Size('count()')
).properties(
    width=200,
    height=200
).repeat(
    column=categorical_filtered,
    row=categorical_filtered
).resolve_scale(
    color='independent',
    size='independent'
)
```


```{python}
alt.Chart(movies_cleaned).mark_boxplot().encode(
    alt.X('Running_Time_min'),
    alt.Y(alt.repeat('row'), type='nominal'),
    tooltip=[
        'Title:N'
    ]
).properties(
    width=100,
    height=100
).facet(
    column='MPAA_Rating'
).repeat(
    row=categorical_filtered
)
```
